name: Deliberation
description: Multi-voice consensus protocol — phased lifecycle (PROPOSED→REVIEWING→SYNTHESIZING→CONVERGING→SETTLED|ESCALATED|EXHAUSTED) with quorum, anti-dropout-bias, argument-based synthesis, and bounded convergence rounds.

defaultRounds.description: Default convergence-round hard cap when propose() omits rounds

checkpointTTLDays.description: Days before a deliberation checkpoint is eligible for sweep

occMaxRetries.description: Max stale-retry attempts on StaleDeliberationError in assembleCouncil and applyDecision

probeTimeoutMs.description: Default per-leg timeout for probeAgent. 30s was too tight for cold-start Claude calls — single slow leg dropped a voter and council escalated with quorum_lost. Mirror in @zana-ai/core/probe-config.ts.

probeRawMaxBytes.description: Max bytes of raw probe response captured in ProbeFailure.raw

probeCacheTtlMs.description: TTL (ms) on probeAgent result cache, keyed by profileId+modelId. 0 disables.

synthesisSimilarityThreshold.description: Dice coefficient threshold for cross-voter finding grouping

voterTimeoutMs.description: Per-voter timeout in collectReviews. Default 20 min — real-Claude voters reading codebases need more than 10.

escalationStrategy.description: human | judge | hybrid. 'judge' auto-resolves cap_exhausted/quorum_lost via a judge agent. 'hybrid' = judge for low/medium risk, human for high risk. riskTag=high always escalates to human regardless of this setting.

judgeProfileId.description: Profile id used to spawn the adjudication agent when escalationStrategy is 'judge' or 'hybrid'.

judgeTimeoutMs.description: Per-call timeout for the judge agent. Default 10 min.
